sourceList.title: Wikipedia: Manasses I of Guînes (circa 1075 - Anderne, December 18, 1137) was Count of Guînes from 1091 until his death.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibilla Rose Guines於大約1005年出生在法國布爾波乃斯時，她的父親Miles de Ghisnes35歲，母親Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne35歲。她於大約1030年與Henri I de BOURBOURG在法國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1059年在法國阿奎泰享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibilla Rose Guines于大约1005年出生在法国布爾波乃斯时，她的父亲Miles de Ghisnes35岁，母亲Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne35岁。她于大约1030年与Henri I de BOURBOURG在法国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1059年在法国阿奎泰享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Guines
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Irish Guinness, a shortened form of McGinnis . This surname is found predominantly in TX.

variants.name: McGinnis
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Aonghuis or Mag Aonghusa ‘son of Aonghus’ (see Angus ). This is the surname of a chieftain family in western County Down. Compare the Scottish form McInnis , and the variant McNeese . Compare also McGuinness .

nameMeanings.name: Sibilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sibella
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

en.lifeSummary: When Sibilla Rose Guines was born about 1005, in Bourbonnais, France, her father, Miles de Ghisnes, was 35 and her mother, Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne, was 35. She married Henri I de BOURBOURG about 1030, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1059, in Aquitaine, France, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibilla Rose Guines est née environ 1005, à Bourbonnais, France, son père, Miles de Ghisnes, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Henri I de BOURBOURG environ 1030, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1059, à Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibilla Rose Guines um 1005 in Bourbonnais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Miles de Ghisnes 35 und ihre Mutter Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne 35. Sie hat um 1030 in Frankreich Henri I de BOURBOURG geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1059 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Aquitaine, Frankreich.

Lei sposato Henri I de BOURBOURG circa 1030, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1059, nel Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibilla Rose Guinesが約1005年にフランスボウルボナイスで生まれた時，父Miles de Ghisnesは35歳，母Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogneは35歳であった。約1030年にフランスでHenri I de BOURBOURGと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1059年にフランスアクイティアインで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibilla Rose Guines(이)가 대략 1005년 프랑스 부르보나이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Miles de Ghisnes(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1030년 프랑스에서 Henri I de BOURBOURG(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1059년 프랑스 아키테인에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibilla Rose Guines nasceu aproximadamente 1005, em Bourbonnais, França, seu pai, Miles de Ghisnes, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Henri I de BOURBOURG aproximadamente 1030, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1059, em Aquitaine, França, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibilla Rose Guines родилась около 1005 г. в местности бурбоннеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Miles de Ghisnes было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henri I de BOURBOURG около 1030 г. в местности Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1059 г. в местности аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibilla Rose Guines nació aproximadamente 1005, en Bourbonnais, Francia, su papá, Miles de Ghisnes, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Henri I de BOURBOURG aproximadamente 1030, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1059, en Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 55 años.
